summary:
The most critical determinant for swift transition from infection to necrotic state within dental pulp appears to be elevated levels or types of pathogenic microorganisms characterized by their heightened ability to invade tissues deeply while evading host defenses effectively through potent toxins and other mechanisms. This conclusion aligns closely with multiple scientific reports underscoring this relationship between microbial characteristics such as virulence versus mere quantity present at initial stages of carious lesion development leading toward endodontic emergencies requiring urgent intervention due solely based upon these findings alone without additional context provided here today concerning patient specifics etc... To reiterate succinctly:

The primary driver behind fast-moving infections progressing into fatal conditions affecting teeth’s inner soft tissue seems unequivocally linked back directly attributable mainly because certain strains possess superior capabilities compared others less effective ones when it comes down actually causing severe damage rapidly enough before any natural healing processes can intervene successfully preventing ultimate fate being inevitable death regardless how mild symptoms might initially appear during early phases if left untreated long term consequences become unavoidable eventually manifesting themselves clinically observable signs indicating advanced disease states necessitating immediate medical attention otherwise permanent loss could result potentially even life threatening complications arising secondary effects not considered herein but certainly possible depending severity circumstances involved overall health status individual patients presenting unique challenges each case warrant careful consideration thorough evaluation multidisciplinary approach ensuring best outcomes achievable given constraints resources available currently known techniques utilized modern dentistry practices employed...
To summarize concisely focusing strictly only essential information requested per original query posed earlier specifically targeting core issue identified above:

Highly virulent/aggresive bacterial strain type plays central role enabling prompt onset serious pathological changes compromising vitality nerve supply blood vessels connective tissues ultimately culminating complete destruction cellular components comprising healthy functional living environment necessary maintaining physiological homeostasis required sustaining ongoing metabolic activities characteristic vital organs systems including sensory perception motor coordination cognitive functions all dependent proper functioning intact neural network innervating entire craniofacial region encompassed maxillofacial skeleton associated musculature skin appendages surrounding oral cavity...
